whatsapp-intro: Use AI agents on WhatsApp for customer support and to gather information from contacts.
whatsapp-provision-note: Lines are created by an administrator in the admin site. Here you only customize how each line behaves.
whatsapp-empty-lines: No WhatsApp numbers yet. Ask an administrator to connect a line for your organization.
notification-rule-modal-ai-only-hint: Pick the alert rule and recipients, describe in your own words when to be notified, then generate conditions with the assistant. You do not need to write expressions manually.
notification-rule-generate-first: Generate conditions with the assistant first.
notification-rule-generate-first-hint: Click “Generate suggestion” to build the condition and message from your description.
notification-conditions-edit-hint: You can edit or remove what the assistant generated, or add more conditions.
notification-builder-hint: Choose the alert rule, who to notify (user, role, or whole organization), and describe when you want to be notified. The assistant fills in the conditions.
notification-builder-select-recipients: Choose who should receive this notification: a user, a role, or the whole organization.
describe-notification: What should we notify you about?
notification-builder-prompt-description: You can also say whether you want notifications in the app only, by email only, or on all channels (app and email).
notification-builder-placeholder: Example: "Notify me when there are five or more pending issues for the billing alert."
no-notification-rules-found: No notification rules yet. Create your first one!
notification-rule-multi-user-edit-hint: Saving will remove this rule and create one rule per selected user.
sure-this-action-cannot-be-undone-click-: Sure? This action cannot be undone. Click again to confirm.
name: Name
please-select-at-least-one-agent: Please select at least one agent
generate-completions-description-2: is relevant to your business, you can generate completions for it to add more context to your agents when answering similar conversations in the future.
after-generating-completions: After generating completions, you can approve, edit or discard them.
select-agents-that-will-retrain: Select the agents that will retrain on this conversation. Keep in mind that each agent will generate its own completions based on its system prompt.
you-can-use-this-page-to-train-your-mode: You can use this page to train your model with files.
a-completion-is-a-pair-of-a-prompt-and-a: A completion is a pair of a prompt and an answer. You can use this page to train your model with completions.
settings-description: You can change the language of the app here.
share-conversation-description: You can share this conversation with the entire world by generating a public link. Set a datetime for expiration, by default it will be 30 days.
shared-conversation-unavailable: This shared conversation could not be loaded. Check the link or ask for a new one.
chunks-mode-help-text: In chunks mode, the AI will receive a **n quantity** of chunks from the document depending of the user query.
all-content-mode-help-text: In **all content** mode, the AI will receive all the possible text from the document depending of the available prompt tokens for the next iteration.
no-organizations-message: You don't have any organizations yet. Create one to share conversations with your team, creating training AI models collaboratively and more.
max-memory-messages-description: The maximum number of messages that will be passed as context for the agents in the current conversation. The oldest messages will be automatically deleted. Default: 10.
speech-being-generated-wait-a-second: Speech being generated, wait a second...
explain-its-role-to-the-ai: Explain its role to the AI
document-templates-you-can-replicate-usi: Document templates you can replicate using AI
searching-similar-information-in-the-dat: Searching similar information in the database...
login-description: Sign in to your account to continue your conversations and access all your tools.
account-deactivated-description: Your account has been deactivated by your organization administrator. You can no longer access this platform. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is a mistake.
forgot-password-description: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
reset-link-sent-description: If an account with that email exists, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
reset-password-description: Set a new password for your account.
reset-password-success: Password reset successful. You can now log in.
invalid-or-expired-reset-link: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
password-min-length: Password must be at least 8 characters
auto-play-description: Automatically play messages when they are generated.
auto-scroll-description: Automatically scroll to the bottom of the chat when a new message is being generated.
tenant-portal-signup-forbidden: Open signup is not available on this organization portal. Ask your administrator for an invite, or sign in if you already have an account.
tenant-portal-go-to-main-app: Create an account on the main application
signup-open-description: Sign up to start using the platform. You'll create your own organization and can invite others later.
use-valid-signup-link: Please use a valid signup link with an organization ID to register.
organization-not-found: Organization not found. Please use a valid signup link.
multiagentic-modality-description: In grupal mode, each agent can see the context of the other agents. In isolated mode, each agent can only see its own context.
select-at-least-one-agent-to-chat: Select at least one agent to chat
organization-description: Here you can manage your organization
why-user-info-matters-for-ai-personaliza: Give information about the user to the AI helps personalize the responses. You can decide in any conversation if you want to give information about your user or not.
network-error: Network error: Check your internet connection and try again.
conversation-summary-hint: Short description of the thread. Filled by the assistant over time; you can edit it here.
conversation-no-tags-yet: No tags on this conversation yet.
add-tags-modal-hint: Only enabled organization tags are shown. You can have up to three tags per conversation.
no-additional-tags-available: No more tags to add (all are already on this conversation, or none exist).
max-tags-on-conversation: Maximum of three tags per conversation.
title: Title
select-documents-from-your-collections: You can select specific documents from each of your collections
use-completions-active-explanation: Completions is active, the AI will use the passed documents and its own knowledge to answer the user query.
use-completions-inactive-explanation: Completions is inactive, the AI will only use its own knowledge to answer the user query.
the-completions-configuration-do-not-aff: The completions configuration do not affect the documents used, only specifies if completions are used.
are-you-trying-to-make-me-speak-twice: Are you trying to make me speak twice?
isolated-modality-description: In isolated mode, each agent receives only its messages, it doesn't know about the other agents in the conversation.
grupal-modality-description: In grupal mode, each agent can see the context of the other agents. They can also interact with each other because they can see the messages of the other agents.
mermaid-theme-description: The theme to use for the mermaid diagrams. You can ask the AI to generate diagrams using *mermaid syntax*.
video-generated-please-reload: Video generated, please reload the conversation to see it!
out-of-compute-units: Out of compute units, please buy more to continue using our services!
subscription-expired-with-purchased-lock: Your organization subscription is inactive, but you still have purchased credits. Open Billing to subscribe again and use them.
calculator-description: This plugin performs mathematical operations on numbers. The AI model can concatenate different operations to perform complex calculations.
mermaid-diagrams-description: This plugin generates Mermaid diagrams from text. The AI model can generate diagrams from text descriptions. Just ask the modal what you want to generate.
document-maker-description: This plugin generates a document from a markdown code block. The AI model can generate a document from a markdown code block. Just ask the modal what you want to generate.
choose-the-name-of-your-organization: Choose the name of your organization
max-organizations-reached: You have reached the maximum number of organizations allowed. Please delete some organizations to create a new one.
custom-subdomain-description: Claim your own address (e.g. acme.masscer.ai). Your organization name and logo will appear when users visit that URL.
custom-subdomain-requires-subscription: An active subscription is required to claim a custom subdomain.
custom-subdomain-preview: Your app will be available at {{host}}
subdomain-invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (3–63 characters).
subdomain-claim-error: Could not claim subdomain. Please try again.
subdomain-release-error: Could not release subdomain. Please try again.
portal-branding-description: Customize how your portal looks on your subdomain. Logo is set above; favicon is generated automatically from it.
portal-branding-requires-subscription: An active subscription is required to customize portal branding.
portal-branding-app-name-hint: Leave empty to use the organization name.
portal-branding-primary-color-descriptio: Pick a color from the palette or swatches below.
portal-branding-save-error: Could not save portal branding. Please try again.
portal-branding-invalid-color: Primary color must be a hex value like #6e5bff.
api-keys-description: These are the API keys for the services you are using. You can find them in the settings of the service.
transcription-job-initialized: Transcription job initialized! It will appear down soon 👇🏻
you-need-to-record-something-first: You need to record something first
you-need-to-upload-an-audio-file-first: You need to upload an audio file first
youtube-url-required: You need to enter a YouTube URL first
please-enter-voice-id-and-name: Please enter voice id and name
no-alert-rules-found: No alert rules found. Create your first one!
alert-rule-agents-required: Select at least one agent when using selected agents scope.
alert-rule-no-org-agents: No agents belong to this organization yet. Create agents for the organization first.
trigger-description-placeholder: Describe when this alert should be triggered...
confirm-delete-alert-rule: Are you sure you want to delete this alert rule?
conversation-title-prompt-placeholder: Leave empty to use default prompt. Customize how titles are generated for conversations using this agent.
no-tags-found: No tags found. Create your first one!
confirm-delete-tag: Are you sure you want to delete this tag?
org-subscription-banner-no-subscription: Your organization does not have an active subscription. Open Billing to restore access for your team.
org-subscription-banner-inactive: Your organization subscription is not active. Renew in Billing to keep using Masscer.
org-subscription-banner-inactive-with-pu: Your organization subscription is inactive. Open Billing to subscribe again and unlock your purchased credits.
invite-link-description: Share this link so others can sign up and join your organization.
no-members-yet: No members yet. Member list will appear here when the backend is ready.
billing-portal-error: Could not open billing portal. Please try again.
subscription-reactivate-error: Could not reactivate subscription. Please try again.
plan-payg-desc: No monthly fee · Buy credits as needed
choose-a-plan-disabled-custom-subscripti: Your organization is on a custom plan managed by admin. Contact support to change plans.
buy-credits-desc: Choose one of the fixed packages: pay $50/$100/$200 and receive $40/$80/$160 in credits.
buy-credits-disabled-custom-subscription: Top-ups are disabled for custom subscriptions. Contact support or your admin team.
buy-credits-disabled-no-subscription: You need an active subscription to buy extra credit packages.
buy-credits-custom-amount-description: Available only with the can-choose-credits-package-amount feature flag.
buy-credits-invalid-amount: Please enter a valid amount greater than 0.
credits-after-purchase: Purchased-bucket balance after this top-up: {{units}} compute units (approx.)
purchased-locked-after-expiry: You have ${{usd}} USD in purchased credits on hold. Subscribe again to use them.
no-roles-yet: No roles yet. Create one to assign to members.
confirm-delete-role: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
ff-manage-organization-desc: Allows the user to manage organization settings, members, and roles.
ff-alert-rules-manager-desc: Create and manage conversation alert rules for the organization.
ff-tags-management-desc: Create and manage conversation tags for the organization.
ff-conversations-dashboard-desc: Access the conversations dashboard to view and analyze all organization conversations.
ff-edit-organization-agent-desc: Edit the configuration of agents owned by the organization.
ff-conversation-analysis-desc: Enables automatic AI analysis of conversations (organization-level only).
ff-chat-widgets-management-desc: Create and manage embeddable chat widgets for agents.
ff-whatsapp-numbers-management-desc: Customize WhatsApp lines (agent, display name, tool capabilities). Lines are provisioned in the admin.
ff-train-agents-desc: Upload documents and train agents with custom knowledge.
ff-audio-tools-desc: Access audio processing tools like transcription and text-to-speech.
ff-image-tools-desc: Access image generation and editing tools.
ff-video-tools-desc: Access video generation and processing tools.
ff-web-scraping-desc: Enable web scraping capabilities to extract content from URLs.
ff-add-files-to-chat-desc: Upload and attach files to chat conversations.
ff-transcribe-on-chat-desc: Enable voice-to-text transcription directly in the chat input.
ff-chat-generate-speech-desc: Generate speech audio from assistant messages.
ff-multi-agent-chat-desc: Enable conversations with multiple AI agents simultaneously.
ff-manage-llm-desc: Add, configure, and delete LLM model connections.
ff-set-agent-ownership-desc: Transfer agent ownership to the organization.
ff-can-edit-conversation-data-desc: Edit conversation title and tags, user and assistant messages, delete messages and conversations, regenerate or truncate history, and change chat settings (memory limit, auto-scroll, multi-agent mode).
ff-can-replace-agent-in-conversations-de: Temporarily replace the AI agent on widget or WhatsApp threads so inbound messages bypass the AI and operators can reply directly.
ff-can-edit-preferences-desc: Open the Settings page and update profile, theme, background, and other personal preferences.
ff-can-set-notifications-desc: Create and manage notification delivery rules in the alerts hub.
ff-can-create-agents-desc: Create new AI agents from the Agents modal (+).
ff-platform-assistant-desc: Access the Masscer Assistant for organization onboarding and in-app help.
ff-can-connect-drive-account-desc: Connect a Google Drive account for yourself or your organization.
integrations-description: Connect third-party accounts for yourself or your organization.
integrations-google-drive-desc: Read files from a linked Google Drive account.
integrations-no-organization: You need an organization to connect at the org level.
drive-import-description: Select a file to add to your knowledge base and attach to this chat.
drive-import-select-account: Choose which Google Drive account to browse.
drive-import-no-accounts: No Google Drive account connected. Connect one in Integrations first.
drive-import-empty: No files found in the connected Drive account.
assignments-target-not-found: Couldn't find that element on screen
confirm-deactivate-member-description: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{name}}? They will lose access to all organization resources but can be reactivated later.
confirm-reactivate-member-description: Are you sure you want to reactivate {{name}}? They will regain access to the organization.
confirm-remove-member-description: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the organization? This will delete their role assignments and alert subscriptions. This action cannot be undone.
no-organization-to-manage: You don't have an organization you can manage.
create-or-join-organization-in-settings: Create or join an organization in Settings.
widget-manager-description: Create embeddable chat widgets for your agents. Add the embed code to any website to enable AI-powered chat.
widget-theme-description: Visual theme for the embedded widget
widget-show-history-description: When enabled, visitors can open a list of previous chats from the header. The widget always opens in the active chat first.
widget-allow-visitor-attachments-descrip: When enabled, visitors can attach documents and images in the chat. This also turns on “List attachments” and “Read attachment” for the AI. When disabled, those two are turned off (you can re-enable them separately only if you need a rare server-only use case).
widget-first-message-description: Optional greeting shown as an assistant bubble when the widget opens with an empty conversation.
widget-first-message-placeholder: Hi! How can I help you today?
widget-capability-read_attachment-descri: Allows the AI to read uploaded attachments when the user asks about their content.
widget-capability-list_attachments-descr: Allows the AI to discover which attachments are available in the current conversation.
widget-capability-explore_web-descriptio: Allows the AI to search and fetch web information in real time.
widget-capability-rag_query-description: Allows the AI to query your knowledge base for relevant context.
widget-capability-create_image-descripti: Allows the AI to generate images from user requests.
widget-capability-create_speech-descript: Allows the AI to generate speech/audio from text.
widget-capability-read_plugin_instructio: Allows the AI to read plugin usage instructions before calling tools.
widget-capability-raise_alert-descriptio: Allows the AI to create internal alerts based on conversation events.
widget-capability-generate_video-descrip: Allows the AI to generate short videos from user requests (sent on WhatsApp when enabled).
widget-capability-generate_document_file: Allows the AI to create downloadable document files from conversation content.
widget-capability-list_document_template: Lists document templates assigned to the agent.
widget-capability-render_document_templa: Fills a document template and returns a downloadable file.
widget-capability-create_completion-desc: Saves a training completion for fine-tuning.
widget-capability-query_organization_tag: Lists enabled tags for the organization.
widget-capability-change_conversation_ta: Assigns tags to the current conversation.
widget-capability-get_tag_context-descri: Lists other conversations with the same tag.
widget-capability-query_conversation-des: Answers a question about another conversation thread.
widget-avatar-upload-description: Shown on the chat bubble and header. PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF up to 2 MB.
widget-avatar-image-description: Optional. Use upload above, or an https:// URL or data:image/...;base64,... string.
no-widgets-found: No widgets found. Create your first one!
data-governance-retention-description: Control how long deleted conversations and file attachments are kept. Leave empty to keep data forever.
data-governance-attachment-min-hint: Minimum 7 days when set. Empty = keep forever.
data-governance-export-description: Request a zip archive of your organization data. You will be notified when it is ready to download.
data-governance-export-started: Export started — you will be notified when it is ready
data-governance-export-category-required: Select at least one data category
data-governance-load-error: Could not load data governance settings
data-export-ready-toast: Your data export is ready to download
knowledge-base-description: Manage your documents, completions, and Word templates for your organization agents.
templates-tab-description: Upload .docx files with placeholders like {{ variable_name }}, describe each variable, then assign templates to organization agents so they can fill them in chat.
templates-no-organization: You need to belong to an organization to manage document templates.
template-name-required: Enter a template name before uploading.
templates-jinja-hint: Use Jinja-style placeholders in the document, e.g. {{ client_name }}
no-templates-yet: No templates yet. Upload a .docx above.
variable-description: How should the AI fill this?
template-assigned-partial: Saved for {{ok}} agent(s). {{failed}} could not be saved.
no-agents-to-assign-template: Every agent in this organization already has this template assigned.
usage-instructions: When should the AI use this template?
usage-instructions-placeholder: e.g. When the user asks for an invoice or says they need a bill.
no-placeholders-detected: No placeholders were found in this file.
no-documents-yet: No documents yet. Upload your first document to get started.
completions-hint: Completions are generated from conversations and documents. Train on a conversation or document to create completions.
completions-status-filter-all-help: All completions, with pending first, then approved
completions-status-filter-pending-help: Only completions that are not approved yet
no-completions-match-filters: No completions match your current search or filters.
drag-drop-or-click-to-upload: Drag & drop files here or click to upload
completion-approved-toggle-on: Will be indexed for agents when you save.
completion-approved-toggle-off: Not indexed until you save as approved.
completion-include-for-tags-help: When the conversation is labeled with any of these tags, this training row is injected without RAG lookup.
notification-sounds-enabled-description: Short tones when the assistant finishes, async jobs complete, or errors occur.
notification-sounds-tone-description: More tones will be available in future updates.
profile-helptext: This information helps the AI personalize its responses for you. It is optional but recommended.
view-only-mode: You are viewing this conversation in read-only mode. Only the owner can send messages or edit.
view-only-mode-whatsapp: This thread is on WhatsApp. Replies are sent from your WhatsApp Business number, not from here. This view is read-only.
human-takeover-prompt: A team member can take over this chat and reply directly to the customer.
human-takeover-active-self: You are handling this conversation. The AI agent is paused.
human-takeover-active-by: {{name}} is handling this conversation. The AI agent is paused.
human-takeover-released: Conversation released back to the agent.
human-takeover-conflict: Another team member already has this conversation.
human-takeover-unsupported-attachment: Only uploaded files are supported in human takeover mode.
landing-hero-description: AI is changing our lives. Our focus is to let you create professional-grade AI agents, customized to your unique needs.
landing-mockup-chat-1: Hi, how can I help you?
landing-mockup-chat-2: I want to create an agent for my business
landing-mockup-chat-3: Sure. You can set it up in under 5 minutes...
landing-mockup-alert-1: Charly reserved a room for two
landing-mockup-whatsapp-in: Hi, I want info about pricing
landing-create-agents-description: Focus on what matters. We take care of the rest. Create AI agents with your data, then use them to answer WhatsApp messages, create videos, documents, and much more.
landing-manage-relationships-title: Manage client and team relationships the smart way
landing-manage-relationships-description: Masscer AI helps you nurture relationships with your clients and team members in the smartest way. Stay on top of conversations, get AI insights, and scale your communication without losing the human touch.
landing-embed-website-title: Add an AI agent to your website in under 5 minutes
landing-embed-website-description: Have a website? Embed a chat widget with your AI agent and start attending visitors in minutes. No coding required—copy, paste, and you're live.
landing-automate-whatsapp-description: Let your AI agent handle customer inquiries, support tickets, and conversations 24/7.
landing-generate-media-description: We focus on making the creative process easier and more productive.
ff-agent-task-desc: Allows running AI agents with tool execution capabilities in conversations.
use-agent-tasks-desc: When on, uses the agent task path (Celery). When off, uses streaming. Useful for testing both paths.
organization-billing-blocked-generic: This message could not be sent because of your organization billing status. Check Billing in organization settings.
organization-billing-blocked-subscriptio: Your organization subscription is not active. Renew in Billing to keep chatting.
Your organization subscription is inactive. Open Billing to subscribe again and use your purchased credits.
organization-billing-blocked-out-of-bala: Your organization has no credits left. Add credits or upgrade in Billing.
organization-billing-blocked-no-subscrip: Your organization has no active subscription. Open Billing to choose a plan.
organization-billing-blocked-no-org-wall: Organization billing is not set up correctly. Contact support or your admin.
organization-billing-blocked-billing-che: We could not verify billing right now. Try again in a moment or contact support.
execution-log-load-error: Unable to load the execution log right now.
execution-log-empty: No agent session details were found for this message.
execution-log-no-tools: No tools were used in this agent session.
invite-member-email-hint: We will email a link so this person can choose their password and join your organization.
invite-invalid-or-expired: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
invite-email-already-registered: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
notes-bio-description: Agents can read this — e.g. room number, preferences
username-required-hint: Username, email and password are required
